'''DFS-1308''' was one of the [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|''Vulture''-class starfighters]] assigned to [[Saak'ak/Legends|''Saak'ak'']] during the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Blockade of Naboo]]. It analyzed but was unable to calculate the "[[Human/Legends|Human]] element" inside the [[N-1 starfighter/Legends|N-1 starfighter]].

{{Droid-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The image used to represent DFS-1308 is a frame captured from [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''The Phantom Menace'']] which was slightly modified by artists at [[Decipher]] The same frame was also used to represent [[DFS-1104]].
